series_metadata.series_description: Record documents the Agency’s reconciliation of expenditures in the Ohio Administrative Knowledge System (OAKS, Ohio’s computer system) to ODJFS federal expenditure reports to ensure the department maximizes federal reimbursements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years and 4 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits have been completed and released, and all discrepancies have been resolved. ; Electronic: Retain in office 3 years and 4 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits have been completed and released, and all discrepancies have been resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
